content.en:
"You are the Eternal Daoist powerhouse of the Blood Lake Ridge, what are you going to do?"

Luo Wushuang asked.

The leader of the Eternal Daoist powerhouse is the Eternal Daoist late-stage powerhouse of the Blood Lake Ridge Eternal Daohua - Mo Lin, the Eternal Daoist has reached the realm of ten percent, and his strength is far beyond the ordinary Eternal Daoist late-stage powerhouse.

Even if his grandfather's strength recovered, he was far from Merlin's opponent.

"Hand over the treasures you bid on at the auction!"

Merlin threatened.

Really.

Luo Wushuang guessed that this was the case, otherwise Luo Xia Pavilion and forces like Blood Lake Ridge would not have communicated at all, and the other party would not attack them!

"Blood Lake Ridge!"

Ye Tian had heard of this force, it was not a big force in the ancient kingdom, but it was much more powerful than the Tempest Chamber of Commerce, with three Eternal Dao realms, and there were more than twenty powerhouses in the late stage of Eternal Dao Transformation.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Look for death!"

Merlin and the others were angry and attacked directly.

Immediately after, they saw Ye Tian's terrifying strength.

Rumble!!!!!

Puff puff puff!!

One by one, the threads of the Eternal Sequence to the Laws of the Dao penetrated their bodies, and they were severely wounded one by one.

Merlin's strength is very strong, he is an eternal Dao powerhouse who has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao, but he has only cultivated a supreme mythical body, so his strength is not too strong, and he still can't block Ye Tian's casual blow.

Burst!

Merlin was also hit hard.

But.

Ye Tian didn't kill Mo Lin and them, otherwise he could have been fine, but Luo Xia Pavilion would be in trouble.

He didn't want to leave Luoxia Pavilion yet, so there was no need to cause trouble.

"Don't get out of here!"

Ye Tian threatened.

Merlin and the others fled directly, not daring to turn back.

Luo Xia Ge also breathed a sigh of relief, if it weren't for Ye Tian, she wouldn't even be able to bring back the auction items she was bidding on this time.

Soon after, they returned to Roselle.

After coming back, Ye Tian went into retreat to cultivate, and Luo Wushuang also used the things he had won from the auction to heal the sea of punishment.

Once Xinghai recovers from his injuries, at least the situation will be better, and even if Ye Tian leaves in the future, at least he will be able to barely keep Luoxia Pavilion.

......

"Ruin Sun Disk, you have to study this Eternal Primordial Treasure first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the market is a disc and someone gave it an instruction manual, so it is easier to study.

In the following days, Ye Tian studied the deduction ability of the ruin disc.

After a period of time, I barely researched it, and then I began to really use the Sunset Disc.

"Just deduce the light of Luoxia, the eternal and Taoist secret technique!"

Ye Tian placed the Sun Disc in his body at the Origin, and began to urge the Sun Disc with the Origin.

Rumble!!!!

The ruin sun disc is running, and a strange force acts on the origin of the body, bringing a great burden to the body, and even the origin is affected, which is affecting the foundation.

But Ye Tian didn't care about the damage to the foundation at all, he continued to use the ruin sun disc to start deducing the light of Luoxia.

Buzz Buzz!!!!

With the continuous urging of the ruin disc, frantically deducing the light of Luoxia, and perfecting the light of Luoxia little by little, Ye Tian's foundation was gradually greatly affected, and his body was a little unbearable.

However, he didn't care at all.

A long time has passed.

Ye Tian's replica body has been completely scrapped.

So, he condensed a new replica body, annihilated the scrapped replica body, and continued to urge the ruin sun disk.

In this way, with the passage of time, Luo Xia's light gradually perfected from the ordinary Eternal Dao Secret Technique to the powerful Eternal Dao Secret Technique, until a long time later, Luo Xia's Light perfected to the top Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

At this time, Ye Tian continued to deduce, striving to perfect Luoxia's light to the top level of the Eternal Dao Secret Technique.

Hundreds of thousands of solstice epochs have passed.

At this time.

Luo Xia's light had been deduced by Ye Tian to the point where it was almost impossible to continue deducing, and it had reached the limit of its true potential.

"Cultivate the new Luoxia Light and try the effect. "

Ye Tian urged the new Luoxia Light, and the Eternal Sequence Dao Rules formed a new Luoxia Light, which was integrated into the body, and quickly carried out the Eternal Dao transformation.

"It's working very well, at least ten times as good as in the past!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Compared with this new Luoxia light, the Luoxia light in the past is simply full of loopholes!

Of course.

For many Eternal Daoist powerhouses, the light of Luoxia in the past was already very good.

......

Human domain.

Ye Tian taught the new Luoxia Light to his wife and children, and spent a lot of money to purchase high-grade and even top-quality first-order Dao rule items from the ancient realm, and sent them to the Void Domain, so that his wife and children could comprehend the first-order Dao rules, and strive to comprehend the first-order Dao rules to the Ten Percent Perfection realm as soon as possible.

Only when the first sequence of supreme dao rules has reached the consummation realm can he use high-quality eternal sequence supreme dao rule items to make them comprehend the eternal sequence supreme dao rules!

In this way, they were able to step into the realm of the late stage of eternity and enlightenment.

Hundreds of thousands of years have passed to the Dao era.

At this time, Ye Tian's Eternal Dao progress, with the help of the new Luoxia Light, reached the Ten Percent Eternal Dao realm.

Rumble!!!!!

At this moment, the eighteen supreme divine bodies were completely fused into one, achieving the most powerful eternal supreme body.

"Eternal to Dao Ten Percent Realm, Eternal Sequence to Ten Percent Dao Rules, I can now impact the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

So on this day, Ye Tian hit the Eternal Dao Realm in the Void Domain.

Impacting the Eternal Dao Realm, satisfying the Eternal Dao Ten Realm, and comprehending the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao, you can go to the impact, but the success rate is different.

Ye Tian's root is basically terrifying, coupled with the comprehension of the Ten Percent Perfection Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and now he has deduced the top Eternal Supreme Dao Secret Technique, with a success rate of nearly 100%.

If he fails to break through, then no one will be able to break through.

"Let's start impacting!"

Ye Tian began to urge the new Luoxia Light with the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules of the Ten Percent Perfection Realm, and used the Luo Xia Light to stimulate the Ten Percent Perfection Eternal Dao incarnation body, and began to transform the origin of the body.

Before the eternity reached the Dao realm, the origin was getting bigger and bigger, more and more majestic, as if it was endless.

But at the moment of breakthrough, the origin is constantly shrinking, gradually turning into the size of an apple.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's transformation was successfully transformed, constantly compressed, and every moment was compressed more than ten times.

Crazy compress!

Gradually, the vast and boundless origin gradually took on an outline, and gradually became smaller, as small as a small world, as small as a hill, as small as a plate, and finally as small as an apple.
